steps.title: Identify the key advantage in Fazal's notes about binary cycle systems
steps.content: The decisive signal is Fazal's claim about binary cycle systems: returning 100% of geothermal fluid yields “the least environmental impact with little or no emissions.” This advantage is both specific to Platanares' technology and includes Fazal's own causal logic—the exact combination needed to accomplish the goal.

steps.title: Match the quotation to Fazal's reasoning
steps.content: Choice C uses Fazal's quotation about “the least environmental impact” and includes the reasoning Fazal provides (the 100% fluid return), directly meeting the goal of explaining an advantage of the Platanares system with Fazal's logic intact. The other choices either misattribute Fazal's comparison to other systems, distort her causal logic, or cite only a procedural detail without framing it as an advantage. That matches choice C — C is correct.
